hook.summary: Static promotional splash screen featuring iconic Dragon Ball Z characters.
hook.visual_action: Goku, Yamcha, Krillin, and Tien stand in battle poses surrounded by floating Dragon Balls and energy auras.
hook.text_overlay: DRAGON BALL Z DOKKAN BATTLE Play Now

scene_flow: Static display of the game's title and main characters in a battle-ready stance.
Visual focus on the 'Play Now' call-to-action button centered on the screen.
Legal disclaimers regarding character availability and copyright appear at the bottom.
on_screen_text: *The image is the characters' forms after Dokkan Awakening.
*Some characters featured in the video may not be available at certain times of the year.
audience_proxy: Male anime fans aged 18-35 who are nostalgic for Dragon Ball Z.
